epidemiology.diagnosticCriteria: Elevated TSH (>4.5 mU/L) with low free T4 levels, per SBEM guidelines

regionalSpecificities.diagnosisCriteria: Aligned with international standards (TSH and T4 testing)
regionalSpecificities.treatmentProtocol: Lifelong levothyroxine replacement, available free via SUS
regionalSpecificities.regionalChallenges: Access delays in rural/Northern regions; diagnostic lab shortages
regionalSpecificities.strongPoints: Nationwide SUS coverage for medication; strong endocrinology societies like SBEM
